name: Swedish Nut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream sugar and eggs until light and fluffy.
3. Add pineapple, baking soda, flour, and vanilla; mix well.
4. Fold in chopped walnuts.
5. Pour batter into greased cake pan.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and firm to touch.
7. Turn off the oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing from pan.
